title: NameValuePair

name.description: The text representing the name of the aspect for the name-value pair. For example, color, or Tire Type.

value.description: The value of the aspect for the name-value pair. For example, red, or All Season.

description: This type contains the name-value specifics of a multi-variation listing (variationAspects) or the name-value specifics for all item aspects of a linked line item (linkedOrderLineItems).
